log: Sef Adeyemi says nothing for a long while, which from Sef Adeyemi counts as a whole conversation.
You wait a day in port. The dockworkers play cards. The meter runs.
◇ THE BROADCAST — every radio in the sector played the same four seconds. The band has holes in it now.
Sef Adeyemi has taken to leaving the radio on at night. "So I'd notice," they say, "if it went quiet."
You wait a day in port. The dockworkers play cards. The meter runs.
